title: Ternary liquid equilibria in propionic acid‐water‐solvents systems
author_string: Rathindranath, Sinha, Venkateswarlu, K., Rao, R. Jagannadha
journal: Journal of Applied Chemistry and Biotechnology
abstract: AbstractMutual solubility and tie‐line data are presented for four ternary liquid‐liquid systems containing propionic acid, water and the hydrocarbons benzene, toluene, xylene and kerosene, at 30°C. The tie‐line data for the systems are correlated by the methods of Hand and of Othmer and Tobias, and the plait points are located by the method of Treybalet al.For all the systems the distribution of propionic acid is more in favour of the aqueous phase. Among the four hydrocarbons studied, benzene showed the highest distribution coefficient as well as selectivity.
